countbites
a quieter way to count.
Macro Calculator · v2

Numbers that feel
like yours.

No flashing colors. No noise. Just a careful estimate of what your body might need today — built from the same formulas your nutritionist would use.

An estimate, not a rule. Bodies vary day to day — use this as a kind starting point.
